entries.title: About the Course
entries.content:
This year, students will learn how to play football, badminton, and softball through participating in a variety of games, skills, and activities. Activities are geared for smaller groups of students but can be adjusted to any size.

This topic is included in the following course(s): PE: Grades 4-6, PE: Grades 7-12

PE: Grades 4-6
Lessons specifically created for Grades 1-6. We recommend you make sure to include some sort of physical activity as breaks throughout your school day. If you already have sports or similar activities as a regular part of your life rhythms, these lessons are optional.

PE: Grades 7-12
Lessons specifically created for Grades 7-12. We do recommend you prioritize the Historical Dance lessons as these are less likely to be obtained elsewhere and also give depth and richness to student's understanding of the time period. We recommend you make sure to include some sort of physical activity as breaks throughout your school day. If you already have sports or similar activities as a regular part of your life rhythms, these lessons are optional.
